specific_question: In Q3 2025, what were the top non-billing customer service complaints?
answer: In Q3 2025, the top non-billing complaints were video quality issues (22%), difficulty booking preferred appointment times (19%), and long wait times for mental health counselors (15%).
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
